seoTitle: Clear Mountain vs Clermont — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clear Mountain and Clermont. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clear Mountain vs Clermont: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clear Mountain and Clermont.
heading: Clear Mountain vs Clermont — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clear Mountain, Queensland and Clermont, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clermont has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Clear Mountain (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clear Mountain or Clermont safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clear Mountain has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Clermont scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clear Mountain scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Clermont scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clear Mountain or Clermont?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clermont has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
